5.4.7 DeepNorm
Function Usage
During the training process of a deep neural network, DeepNorm can be used as a
replacement for LayerNorm normalization in order to improve the stability of
Transformers by expanding residual connections.
This API applies DeepNorm normalization to input data with a shape size of [B, S,
H]. The calculation formula is as follows:
DeepNorm(x) = LayerNorm(α * X + SubLayer(X))
SubLayer(X) typically refers to a sub-l...
